headline: MiniMed raises $560 million IPO, pricing shares below marketed range
summary: The Medtronic diabetes spinoff sold 28 million shares at $20, implying a $5.6 billion valuation.

headline: Medtronic’s MiniMed goes public for $560M
summary: The diabetes tech business is now operating as a standalone, public company. Shares began trading on Friday.

headline: MiniMed to begin trading on Nasdaq Global Select Market
summary: Medtronic plc (NYSE: MDT), a global leader in healthcare technology, announced that MiniMed Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: MMED) will begin trading today on the Nasdaq Global Select Market (Nasdaq) under the ticker symbol "MMED" in connection with its initial public offering ("IPO").

headline: MiniMed announces pricing of initial public offering
summary: MiniMed Group, Inc. (MiniMed), a subsidiary of Medtronic plc (Medtronic) (NYSE: MDT), today announced the pricing of its initial public offering (IPO) of 28,000,000 shares of its common stock at a price to the public of $20.00 per share. The shares are expected to begin trading on the Nasdaq Global Select Market (Nasdaq) on March 6, 2026, under the symbol "MMED." The offering is expected to close on March 9, 2026, subject to customary closing conditions.
